title: Remove role detection and global fallback
description: Remove contributor/maintainer role logic, ~/.beads fallback, redirect system, and related CLI options.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Searched codebase for role detection, beads.role, BEADS_DIR, redirect routing, and ~/.beads usage. No role detection or redirect logic found in Taskulus runtime; only .beads references are migration paths. No code changes required for this task.
